headline: Ryan Cohen Slams eBay Board After GameStop's $56 Billion Bid Rejected, Says Shareholders Should Vote On His Offer: 'Run By A Bunch Of Losers'
summary: One day after eBay Inc. dismissed the $56 billion takeover proposal as "neither credible nor attractive," GameStop Corp. CEO Ryan Cohen fired back in a letter to Chairman Paul Pressler and in an interview with Piers Morgan, criticizing management and...

headline: Ryan Cohen's eBay bid has been absurd all along
summary: Disgruntled millennial Ryan Cohen has had an interesting week.
